scope.target: Historical lineage disposition, minimal BuildingBlocks contract truth, and a documentation-first reconstruction contract
constraints: Architecture skill owns contract and reconstruction design
BuildingBlocks defaults to interfaces/contracts rather than shared inheritance
Retain one optional EsAggregateRoot abstraction under the approved B conditions
EsAggregateRoot must have a documented behavior contract and executable-tested pure-logic coverage
Source-include copies become target-owned and upgrades use ai-context-upgrader three-way comparison
Unify standards and DBA1009 type recognition
Product Infrastructure owns concrete persistence/messaging/observability adapters
Do not add a complete BuildingBlocks or SampleProduct fixture

steps: Add minimal executable-tested ES abstraction coverage without a reference product
Unify standards and DBA1009 around the selected ES shape
Document source-include target ownership and upgrader reconciliation
Create project-profile reconstruction blueprint and evidence matrix
Use downstream repositories as read-only adoption evidence
Link standards, examples, analyzers, and validators to the reconstruction contract
validation: Concept and provenance coverage matrix review
No committed reference product or unapproved base-class requirement
execution.last_completed_step: Gate 3 selected optional EsAggregateRoot option B with executable, behavior-contract, and upgrader conditions.
execution.next_action: Start after RULE-001 and EXAMPLE-001 establish profile and evidence metadata contracts.
